text.title: django-serializers Output Contract
text.summary: Output is Python source defining serializer classes. The validator parses each class and checks the schema below.

example.note: Valid: Serializer base, explicit fields, naming follows EntityCreateRequest / EntityResponse, password is write_only, no business logic in validate().
Invalid: ModelSerializer + __all__ exposes secrets; validate_email queries DB and triggers a side-effect (both belong in services.user_create).
